violations.text: Rodent burrow holes were observed at the bottom of the stairs leading to the dumpster area. New Violation. Correct By: 08/14/2025

The dumpster outside is located on gravel. The outdoor storage surface for refuse, recyclables, and returnables must be constructed of nonabsorbent material such as concrete or asphalt and must be smooth, durable, and sloped to drain. New Violation. Correct By: 09/25/2025
The outside dumpster is not covered. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. PIC informed. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/23/2024

The dumpster area was observed with trash, discarded bottles, and other debris. Refuse areas must be maintained clean and free of debris to prevent harborage conditions. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/06/2024
The outside dumpster is not covered. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. New Violation. Correct By: 07/23/2024
Trash debris observed around the refuse area. Refuse areas shall be maintained free trash and debris to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 08/06/2024
The floor in the walk-in cooler has an accumulation of debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 08/06/2024
